basic_details.job_title: RMLIMS Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Research Scientist II and Accountant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Sciences
basic_details.post_name: Project Research Scientist II and Accountant
basic_details.short_information: Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Sciences (RMLIMS) Project Research Scientist II and Accountant Notification 2026 has been released on 25 June 2026 on the official website drrmlims.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the RMLIMS Project Research Scientist II and Accountant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS/ BVSc/ BDS + post-graduate degree with three years experience or MPH/ PhD, DTE or M. Com (with Accountancy in B. Com)
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist II: MBBS/ BVSc/ BDS + post-graduate degree, including the integrated PG degrees with three years' experience or MPH/ PhD. Accountant: DTE or M. Com (with Accountancy in B. Com).

rows.dr_ram_manohar_lohia_institute_of_medica: Project Research Scientist II and Accountant
MBBS/ BVSc/ BDS + post-graduate degree with three years experience or MPH/ PhD, DTE or M. Com (with Accountancy in B. Com)

content_sections.heading: RMLIMS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RMLIMS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RMLIMS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RMLIMS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist II: MBBS/ BVSc/ BDS + post-graduate degree, including the integrated PG degrees with three years' experience or MPH/ PhD. Accountant: DTE or M. Com (with Accountancy in B. Com).

content_sections.heading: RMLIMS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for RMLIMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for RMLIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the RMLIMS recruitment is scheduled for 03 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete the registration formalities.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts advertised by RMLIMS?
faq.answer: RMLIMS has advertised for the posts of Project Research Scientist II and Accountant. There is one vacancy for each post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for these RMLIMS posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 45 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for RMLIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this RMLIMS recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist II post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Research Scientist II post will receive a monthly salary of Rs 96,000.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification required for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Accountant post, candidates must possess a DTE or M. Com degree with Accountancy as a subject in B. Com.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Sciences (RMLIMS) office in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for RMLIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for RMLIMS recruitment involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual. More details regarding the contract period can be found in the official notification.
